name: Cosa Buona
teaser: Italian-American classics get the cheffy upgrade. The only pineapple pie I'll eat.
review: Italian-American classics get the cheffy upgrade thanks to Zach Pollack and company. The light but flavorful Neapolitan-esque dough can handle classics and new school toppings well. The rest of the heavily red sauce menu is spot-on. Plus the only pie with pineapple I'll eat.
myOrder: Sausage and fennel, the pineapple pie
headsUp: The full Italian-American menu is just as good as the pizza.
update: Still one of the most underrated pizzerias in the city.
address: 922 N Alvarado St C, Los Angeles, CA 90026, USA
hours: Monday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Tuesday: 4:00 – 9:00 PM · Wednesday: Closed · Thursday: 4:00 – 9:00 PM · Friday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Saturday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Sunday: 1:00 – 9:00 PM
